function: bloaty::RangeMap::AddRangeWithTranslation(unsigned long, unsigned long, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > const&, bloaty::RangeMap const&, bool, bloaty::RangeMap*)
what_input_feature: A well-formed enough object file whose parser produces an AddRangeWithTranslation call where the size argument equals the kUnknownSize sentinel, so the True branch at range_map.cc:260 is taken. The winning seeds carry the Mach-O 64-bit magic ce fa ed fe at offset 0x00-0x03 and a structured header body, whereas the path that sets size==kUnknownSize requires the parser to advance deep enough to emit an unknown-sized range.
why_winner_satisfies: Every winner seed begins with the Mach-O magic ce fa ed fe and shares an identical stable header (offsets 0x00-0x20 fixed across all 10 winners). These inputs drive 22887 hits on the branch and 140 invocations of AddFileRangeForVMAddr, reaching the True side (W: T=70 F=200 at L260) and resolving in 10/10 trials.
why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds carry the WASM magic 00 61 73 6d (\0asm) and are short (17-59 bytes); they reach AddRangeWithTranslation only on the False side (L: T=0 F=366 at L260) and never produce a size==kUnknownSize range, blocking the True branch in 10/10 trials with hitcount 0.
mechanism_attribution: The two fuzzers differ by exactly I2SRandReplace: value_profile_cmplog adds the cmplog input-to-state stage on top of the same comparison feedback value_profile already has. When the parser compares the running size against the kUnknownSize sentinel (a fixed wide constant), the cmplog CMP buffer logs that constant and I2SRandReplace can splice it into the input bytes that flow to the size field, directly synthesizing the equality value_profile's distance feedback only nudges toward. This is I2S comparison-solving on a magic-constant equality gate.

what_input_feature: An input that drives the vmsize argument of IsVerboseForVMRange to exactly RangeMap::kUnknownSize (the all-ones UINT64_MAX sentinel), i.e. a parsed 8-byte size field set to 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF rather than any concrete range length.
why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch in 10/10 trials, taking the true side (W: T=70 F=0 at L1103) and reaching the sentinel-only code at L1104-1105; its seeds carry concentrated 0xff bytes (e.g. offset 0x34 ff x6) inside the parsed header region, exactly the byte value the kUnknownSize equality wants substituted.
why_loser_doesnt: value_profile blocks the branch in 10/10 trials, always taking the false side (L: T=0 F=2170 at L1103) and never executing the sentinel rewrite at L1104; lacking I2SRandReplace it cannot place the exact 8-byte UINT64_MAX sentinel into the size field, so the equality never holds.
mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace to value_profile's stack; I2S logs the runtime CMP operand kUnknownSize (UINT64_MAX) and substitutes it directly into the matching input bytes, satisfying the exact-equality gate. value_profile's CMP_MAP only buckets operand distance and cannot synthesize the all-ones constant, so it stalls at the false side.

what_input_feature: The ICC header must declare a profile-class / color-space whose InPCS signature is neither cmsSigXYZData nor cmsSigLabData, so the switch(InPCS) at line 427 falls through to the default arm at line 481. In the winner seeds this is driven by the 4-byte class field at offset 0x0c ('link') and the color-space FOURCC at 0x10-0x13 ('MCH7'/'MCH5'/'MCHD'/'MCHC') rather than the loser's 'mntr'+'RGB ' XYZ/Lab-PCS layout.
why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry the literal bytes 6c 69 6e 6b ('link') at offset 0x0c-0x0f and multi-channel device color-space tags ('MCH7','MCH5','MCHD','MCHC') at 0x10-0x13, which make InPCS resolve to a non-XYZ/non-Lab signature and route execution into the default: arm; the per-role overlay marks line 481 [W] and the winner hits the branch 55 times.
why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds carry 6d 6e 74 72 ('mntr', a display-device monitor class) at 0x0c-0x0f and 'RGB ' / 'XYZ ' fields at 0x10-0x17, producing an InPCS of cmsSigXYZData so the switch resolves to the XYZ case (line 429) and never reaches the default arm; the winner true-hitcount is 55 while the loser is 0.
mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks. The InPCS dispatch is a switch over exact 4-byte signature constants; value_profile's distance-bucket feedback gives no smooth path toward an unrelated FOURCC, but I2SRandReplace logs the compared signature constant and splices it directly into the matching input-byte position, planting the exact non-PCS color-space token that drives execution to the default arm.

what_input_feature: The ICC profile header color-space FOURCC fields (the 4-byte ASCII signatures at offsets 0x10-0x17) must encode the cmsSigLabData / cmsSigXYZData pair (or, via the upstream cmsGetPCS/cmsGetColorSpace swap at lines 562-566, an XYZ-bearing field) so that ColorSpaceIsCompatible receives a==cmsSigLabData && b==cmsSigXYZData and the line-503 double-equality gate evaluates true.

why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds keep the original ICC-header color spaces 'RGB ' at 0x10 (52 47 42 20) and 'XYZ ' at 0x14, which never form the cmsSigLabData/cmsSigXYZData pair, so line 503 is reached but its true-side is never taken and the branch stays blocked in 8/10 trials.
mechanism_attribution: The winner's advantage is I2SRandReplace: the CmpLogObserver records the literal cmsSig FOURCC operands compared at line 503 and I2SRandReplace splices those logged 4-byte constants directly into the matching header-field offsets, snapping the double-equality gate in one substitution. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and can only nudge bytes via Hamming-distance feedback, which does not reliably assemble the exact 4-byte Lab/XYZ signature pair.

what_input_feature: The 4-byte profile deviceClass signature at input offset 0x0c-0x0f must be the FOURCC 'abst' (0x61627374, cmsSigAbstractClass). This makes lIsDeviceLink TRUE at line 543, gates entry into the devicelink block at line 576, and is the literal compared at the blocker line 583 (ClassSig == cmsSigAbstractClass).

With ClassSig == cmsSigAbstractClass the loop reaches line 583; with the abstract profile at i==0 the AND condition (i > 0) is false, so the globally-blocked FALSE side is taken and lines 586-589 execute (marked [W]).

what_input_feature: An ICC profile whose header signature bytes form a class/tag combination (device class 'link' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f) that dispatches parsing into ReadSetOfCurves, where at least one ReadEmbeddedCurve call returns NULL so the Error cleanup loop calls cmsFreeToneCurve(Curves[i]) on a NULL slot, taking the Curve==NULL true branch.
